title: Create: Pressure Gauges
description: A handy utility addon for the Create Mod that introduces a custom Pressure Gauge item to track fluid pipeline connectivity and remaining pump pressure.
body: Create Pressure Gauges is a lightweight, server-safe utility addon for the Create Mod built on NeoForge 1.21. It introduces a custom diagnostic tool item that allows engineering players to dynamically inspect both standard fluid pipes and glass fluid variants. By right-clicking any connected pipe segment, the player instantly receives real-time, pathfinding-calculated diagnostics displayed seamlessly across their action bar, tracking exact pipe distances to the nearest active pump and determining precisely how many blocks of dynamic fluid pressure remain before a pipeline loses throughput.
